title: age-group — permissions
scope_suffix_convention: Every read permission may be seeded WITH a scope suffix (`.any`, `.tenant`). The base permission (no suffix) is the highest-tier variant, effectively `.tenant`. Age groups are tenant-wide reference data — no `.branch` / `.own` variants exist.

permissions.name: age_groups.viewAny
permissions.description: Every tenant role reads the age-group list — age groups are UI reference data (every enrollment + roster + team form reads them).

permissions.name: age_groups.resolve
permissions.description: Read-only resolver endpoint. Widely used across enrollment + team-invite flows.

permissions.name: age_groups.create
permissions.description: Consumes 1 age_group_slot entitlement. Refused for Small tier via AGE_GROUP_CUSTOM_DISABLED.

permissions.name: age_groups.create.sport_specific
permissions.description: Gates the sport_key column on creation. Enterprise-only via age_group_sport_specific entitlement.

permissions.name: age_groups.update
permissions.description: Mutable fields: name, slug, description, color, gender_category, sort_order. Bounds/cutoff/sport_key edits gated further.

permissions.name: age_groups.update.bounds
permissions.description: Separated from base update — bounds changes fire AgeGroupBoundsChanged (audit-critical, 7-year retention). Admin + owner.

permissions.name: age_groups.update.cutoff
permissions.description: Separated from base update — cutoff changes fire AgeGroupCutoffChanged (audit-critical). Admin + owner.

permissions.name: age_groups.set_default
permissions.description: Flip is_default within a (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple.

permissions.name: age_groups.archive
permissions.description: Refused when is_default=true, is_seeded=true, OR when inbound Team/EventDivision rows exist.

permissions.name: age_groups.restore
permissions.description: Reverse of archive. Only within the 1095-day retention window.

permissions.name: age_groups.delete
permissions.description: Owner only. Same guards as archive — plus hard-delete happens only via PurgeArchivedAgeGroupsJob after retention window.

permissions.name: age_groups.manage
permissions.description: Umbrella permission for the settings blueprint gate. Admin + owner.
